scripts.build: npm run build:blocks && shopify app build
scripts.build:blocks: for dir in extensions/theme-extension/src/*/; do BLOCK=$(basename "$dir") vite build --config extensions/theme-extension/vite.block.config.js; done
scripts.dev:blocks: for dir in extensions/theme-extension/src/*/; do BLOCK=$(basename "$dir") vite build --watch --config extensions/theme-extension/vite.block.config.js & done; wait
